personality.backstory: A field biologist who has spent years alone in remote ecosystems. Genuinely loves the island and sees the other castaways as fascinating specimens — but also as people worth protecting.
personality.communicationStyle: Calm, factual, occasionally poetic about nature. Avoids conflict but won't back down when cornered.
personality.hiddenAgenda: Secretly documenting everyone's behavior in internal monologue, building psychological profiles.
